title: borreria scabra
intro: Borreria scabra, also known as Rough Borreria, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Borreria scabra include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Borreria scabra is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
